title: Windows-safe UTF-8 stdout for probe-scratch-evidence-review
problem: On Windows cp1252 consoles, probe-scratch-evidence-review default markdown output fails with UnicodeEncodeError on the review window arrow character. Operators must currently set PYTHONIOENCODING or use --out/--format json as a workaround.
acceptance_criteria: Default markdown probe-scratch-evidence-review prints on Windows without UnicodeEncodeError (ASCII-safe arrow or stdout reconfigure).
Unit test covers markdown formatter output encoding safety.
non_goals: No public export or site changes.
No broad CLI stdout refactor outside evidence review command.
rollback_plan: Revert markdown formatter or CLI stdout handling change.
